HomePage.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.
HomePage.description: This demo already includes internationalization with Next.js. Use the switcher to move between Spanish, English and French.
HomePage.loginDescription: Access your dashboard to monitor sales, catalog updates, and order flow in real time.
HomePage.socialDisclaimer: By continuing you agree to the terms and privacy policy.
HomePage.login-text-1: Control inventory, purchases, and order tracking from one unified workspace.
HomePage.login-text-2: Track conversion, average order value, and category performance minute by minute.
HomePage.login-text-3: Build smart rules for discounts, alerts, and customer-focused recommendations.
HomePage.login-text-4: Sync web, physical store, and marketplaces with instant product updates.
HomePage.login-text-5: Protect sensitive data with role-based access, audit logs, and continuous monitoring.
